name: streaming_student_loss_weights_detpitch_energy_state_focus_v1
notes: Use with deterministic pitch-provider nof0corr probes.
Shift part of the energy learning signal from teacher_energy_proxy to teacher_energy_state so the packet-facing energy calibration target matters earlier.
Keep F0 untouched and do not change aper weights because detpitch_nof0corr already reaches aper_ready_count 2/3.
